summary: Iteration 48 - Testing Highlighter Remove Button (İşareti Kaldır), Margins 'Tümüne Uygula'/'Seçili Metne Uygula' buttons, and Indent panel buttons

ui_bugs.issue: İşareti Kaldır button NOT appearing when clicking on highlighted text (span with data-highlight='true')
ui_bugs.details: The highlighted span exists and has correct data-highlight='true' attribute and style='background:#FFFF00;border-radius:2px;'. However, when clicking on it, the createRemoveBtn function is not being triggered or the button is not being appended. Tested multiple times with direct click coordinates on the span center.

features_tested.Highlighted span created with data-highl: PASS - span with style='background:#FFFF00;border-radius:2px;' and data-highlight='true' confirmed in DOM

highlighted_span_debug.conclusion: handleClick in EditableText is NOT adding the İşareti Kaldır button when target.dataset.highlight === 'true'

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix İşareti Kaldır button not appearing when clicking on highlighted span - CanvasArea.js handleClick function at lines 137-174
The condition 'target.dataset?.highlight === "true"' should trigger createRemoveBtn('İşareti Kaldır', 'highlight-remove-btn') but it doesn't
Possible causes: 1) e.target is not the span itself but a child/parent node, 2) Event propagation issue with onClick vs handleClick, 3) The callback isn't being triggered at all
critical_code_review_comments: CanvasArea.js line 163-169: The condition checks target.dataset?.highlight but the click event target may be resolving to a parent element instead of the span
The handleClick is attached to the EditableText div via onClick={handleClick}, but clicks on inner spans may not bubble correctly
Consider using event delegation or checking e.target.closest('[data-highlight="true"]') instead of direct target check

success_rate.frontend: 85% - Margins and Indent panels working, Highlighter tool works, but İşareti Kaldır removal button NOT appearing

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 48 found that Margins and Indent panels work correctly with 'Tümüne Uygula' and 'Seçili Metne Uygula' buttons present. However, the İşareti Kaldır button for removing highlight from selected text is NOT appearing. The highlighted span is correctly created with data-highlight='true' and yellow background, but clicking on it doesn't show the removal button. This is a bug in CanvasArea.js handleClick function - likely an event target issue.

rca_of_the_issue.issue: İşareti Kaldır button not appearing when clicking on highlighted text
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause_hypothesis: The handleClick callback in EditableText component checks 'target.dataset?.highlight === true' but the click event target may not be resolving to the span[data-highlight='true'] element. Could be: 1) Event target is a text node inside the span, 2) The condition isn't properly matching 'true' as a string, 3) The onClick handler on the outer div is not propagating clicks to handleClick correctly for inner spans.
reproduction_steps: 3. Type text on canvas (e.g., 'Test highlight word')
6. The word gets highlighted with yellow background
8. EXPECTED: 'İşareti Kaldır' button should appear below the text
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation_suggestion: In CanvasArea.js handleClick function (line 138), change the target check to use closest() method: `const highlightSpan = target.closest('[data-highlight="true"]'); if (highlightSpan) { createRemoveBtn('İşareti Kaldır', 'highlight-remove-btn'); return; }`
